text: Set up PayPal and crypto wallet integration for real autonomy
description:
**HUMAN ACTION REQUIRED**

Replace mocked economic system with real financial capabilities.

**PayPal Setup:**
1. Create/designate PayPal developer account
2. Visit https://developer.paypal.com/dashboard/
3. Create REST API credentials (Client ID + Secret)
4. Consider multiple accounts for risk distribution
5. Configure webhook endpoints for payment notifications

**Crypto Wallet Setup:**
1. Generate ETH/BTC wallet addresses for decentralized autonomy
2. Securely store private keys (consider hardware wallet)
3. Set up read-only API access for balance monitoring
4. Document wallet addresses in secure configuration

**Integration Points:**
- Add credentials to autonomy configuration
- Wire up real cost tracking (Anthropic/Google API usage)
- Wire up real revenue tracking (grant income, trading, social posting)
- Enable autonomy ratio dashboard (earned/consumed)

**After setup:** Aims 365e78d0, 55020962, 7dfd41bf can proceed with real financial integration.

status.comment: Waiting for human to set up payment accounts and credentials
